text.title: Video Generation Provider Implementations
text.summary: RunwayVideoGenerator, LumaVideoGenerator, and ReplicateVideoGenerator with known bugs and fixes.

section.title: Runway Gen-3
section.p: Runway provides an official Python SDK. Tasks are async — poll with _wait_for_completion. Video URLs are pre-signed and expire in 30-60 minutes; download immediately after SUCCEEDED.

example.note: Runway content policy violations return FAILED with no useful error message. Do not retry without modifying the prompt.

section.title: Luma Dream Machine
section.p: Luma has no official Python SDK — use httpx REST calls. The original _wait_for_completion has no timeout; a fixed version is required for production.

example.note: Luma video extension uses generation IDs (not video URLs) in keyframes.frame0. Agents must track IDs, not just URLs.

section.title: Replicate Models
section.p: Replicate returns an iterator or URL depending on model and output type. output[0] fails if output is not a list. Pin model version hashes in config — they go stale as providers update.

antipattern.description: Assuming output[0] works for all Replicate models.
antipattern.reason: Replicate returns an iterator or a URL string depending on the model. Calling [0] on a string iterator returns the first character.
